articles.title: India regains top spot in EM tracker, but higher cost pressures continue to linger
articles.description: Stronger exports and factory activity helped India reclaim the top spot in Mint's Emerging Markets Tracker. However, higher crude prices during the West Asia war have raised wholesale inflation and input costs, delaying relief for businesses despite the recent easing in oil prices.

articles.title: Stock Market Today: Sensex, Nifty Likely To See A Muted Start Amid US
articles.description: Stock Market Today: A mix of geopolitical tensions in West Asia, subdued Asian markets and higher crude oil prices could keep benchmark indices range-bound at the start of trade on July 29.

articles.title: Gold Slips As Fresh US-Iran Strikes Boost Oil, Fed Rate-Hike Bets Weigh
articles.description: Gold prices eased on Monday as recent U.S.-Iran strikes in the Gulf pushed oil prices higher, while expectations of U.S. Federal Reserve interest rate hikes further weighed on the non-yielding metal.

articles.description: Investors are expected to keenly observe stock market triggers, including the developments over the US-Iran peace talks, India-US trade deal, trends in FPI flows, and crude oil prices.
